holdings.infoBox: IWB is an equity ETF with a total of 1007 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.06%, Apple at 6.29%, Microsoft at 4.14%, Amazon.com at 3.36%, and Alphabet at 3.12%.

overview.description: The iShares Russell 1000 ETF (IWB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 1000 index, a market-cap-weighted index of the 1000-largest US companies. IWB was launched on May 15, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.
